channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This flashy group of Portland mall-walkers puts neon pep into step
item.description: Krista Catwood wanted a fun way to exercise, so she started a mall-walking group whose unofficial costume was 1980s garb. The festive, all-ages event ...

item.title: U.S. attempt to open Strait of Hormuz tests fragile Iran war ceasefire
item.description: The Iran war risked reigniting after the U.S. tried to force open the Strait of Hormuz, though a ceasefire seemed to be holding Tuesday even after the...

item.title: Primary elections in Ohio, Indiana offer latest temperature check on Trump popularity
item.description: The president seeks to oust Indiana Republicans who blocked a redistricting push in that state, while growing dissatisfaction with Trump's agenda give...

item.title: An explosion at a fireworks plant in China kills at least 26 people, state media says
item.description: Authorities said search and rescue at a fireworks plant in a central Chinese province has largely been completed, but verification of the casualties a...
